arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins to Arsenal transfer depends on crucial Aston Villa decision
arts.sum: Arsenal could end the January transfer window with one new signing in the form of Ollie Watkins. Despite strong links to Jhon Duran, his Aston Villa teammate, the Gunners now look to be setting their sights on Watkins having already tabled an opening bid.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Champions League permutations explained as automatic spot eyed and opponents explained
arts.sum: However, even if Arsenal were to be fast-tracked to the last 16, the side could still face stiff opposition as ninth to 26th spots battle in an extra play-off round. Arsenal will travel to Spanish side Girona on Wednesday night to take part in their final Champions League league phase fixture in the competition's new-fangled format.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have two dream shirt numbers for Ollie Watkins after £60m transfer claim
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins has emerged as a potential transfer target for Arsenal in the final days of the January window. No.10 and No.14 remain available in the Gunners squad, with the latter potentially appealing to Watkins thanks to his admiration for one club legend.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make huge Ollie Watkins decision after Arsenal transfer approach
arts.sum: The 29-year-old, as an Arsenal supporter ever since he was young, is believed to be open to the move and that there should be no issues in agreeing personal terms with talks already advancing on the side of the player. While Emery faces decisions over Duran and Watkins, Villa are also interested in a move for Chelsea's Joao Felix.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed immediate £60m Ollie Watkins transfer response as Aston Villa verdict sent - Sam Truelove
arts.sum: However for the suggested figures in excess of £60million, Watkins at 29 years of age offers no resale value, a lack of longevity in terms of output and the move itself surely rules out moves in the near future for younger options like Benjamin Sesko. In terms of making an immediate impact, there is perhaps no one better given the fact he has proven himself in the Premier League for a number of seasons and has no major pre-existing injuries.

arts.ttl: Arsenal taking transfer risk on Ollie Watkins when alternative is available
arts.sum: On that front, selling Watkins would make the most sense, considering the age of both players and the long-term potential of Duran. He has just 10 goals across 31 appearances this season, but eight assists also.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Shock offer made after Arteta's striker U-turn
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Shock offer made after Arteta's striker U-turn Arsenal have also identified another target in the shape of Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins and a first offer - worth a whopping €72 million - has already been made.

arts.ttl: David Raya injury: Arsenal handed major new fitness concern before Man City showdown
arts.sum: Gunners goalkeeper travelled to Girona but “not fit” to play, according to Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Aston Villa left fuming by Arsenal's £60m Ollie Watkins bid as club make stance clear
arts.sum: Arsenal have launched a surprise £60million bid to sign striker Ollie Watkins from Aston Villa this month and the Midlands side have been left fuming by the timing of the approach

arts.ttl: Watkins to Arsenal: A dream transfer or Arteta's desperate gamble?
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins dreams of playing for Arsenal and Mikel Arteta is trying to help him realise this ambition. Aston Villa, of course, rejected the approach as they are simultaneously locked in negotiations with Al-Nassr over their other elite striker - Jhon Duran.
